title: DiffTruncation
description:
Truncation metadata when the diff was truncated to fit the evaluator's token budget.

Present only when truncation occurred (diff exceeded token budget).
Omitted entirely when the diff fit within budget (clean passthrough).

included_files.description: Files included in the truncated diff.

omitted_files.description: Files omitted from the truncated diff (present in original, absent after truncation).

original_bytes.description: Byte size of the original diff before truncation.

truncated_bytes.description: Byte size of the diff after truncation.
